CustomObject.description: Per-statute litigation risk weights for adjacent statutes that co-occur with NEPA challenges. Seeded from PermitTEC v0.1 corpus. Used by the Litigation Risk Scoring Flow to loop over statutes present on the project and accumulate points.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Statute Risk Weight

fields.description: Human-readable statute name (e.g., Endangered Species Act, Clean Water Act).
fields.label: Statute Label

fields.description: Short key matched against Program.nepa_adjacent_statutes__c using Contains (e.g., ESA, CWA, NHPA).
fields.label: Statute Key

fields.description: Number of PermitTEC litigation cases where this statute co-occurred with a NEPA challenge.
fields.label: Case Count

fields.description: Points added to composite litigation risk score when this statute is present. Scale: 0-10 points. SubscriberControlled so agencies can tune weights without a package update.
fields.label: Risk Points

fields.description: When false, this statute record is excluded from scoring loop queries. SubscriberControlled so agencies can enable/disable statutes without a package update.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: True when the risk multiplier for this statute cannot be decomposed into sub-components due to missing external data. When true, the risk scorer appends a low-confidence disclosure note to the factors string. ESA is flagged pending TAILS/PCTS API linkage.
fields.label: Low Data Confidence

fields.description: Date this record version becomes effective. Flows compare inp_EvaluationDate (= nepa_start_date__c on the IA) against this: only records where Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= EvaluationDate are returned. Null = effective from the beginning of time.
fields.label: Effective Start Date

fields.description: Date after which this record version is no longer effective (EO 14270 sunset compliance). Flows filter: Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= EvaluationDate. Null = no sunset.
fields.label: Sunset Date
